applicant_info.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania.

additional_fields.additional_insured: Additional Insured status is extended to Woodbridge Realty Management Inc. as required by written contract. Coverage is primary and non-contributory.
additional_fields.special_conditions: Primary and Non-Contributory wording applies per policy endorsement.
additional_fields.subcontractor_requirements: Evidence of Workers' Compensation coverage is required from all subcontractors prior to commencing work on the project.

remarks: Endorsement schedule, additional insured (Woodbridge Realty Management Inc. - primary and non-contributory), special conditions, four location descriptions, subcontractor WC evidence requirement, and nature of operations detailed on this ACORD 101 Additional Remarks Schedule attached to ACORD 130 Workers Compensation Application.
